title: calyx long-run state.json (#888)
description: Mutable per-run state written by longrun-supervise.sh next to the immutable spec.json. Survives reboot; read by resume to decide no-op vs continue.

run_id.description: Unique run identifier == systemd instance name (%i).

status.description: Desired/observed state. Only 'completed' triggers the idempotent no-op on re-entry.

completed_units.description: Final committed unit count read from the SoT on success.

last_cursor.description: Live committed cursor read from the real SoT (SQLite COUNT, vault cx rows), refreshed on heartbeat.

last_heartbeat.description: UTC timestamp of the most recent state write; staleness => stuck/dead supervisor.

resume_command.description: Human-readable, copy-pasteable command to resume this run by hand.

last_exit.description: Exit code of the most recent worker run.
